# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for sqs policy too permissive and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    Description: Environment name

Resources:
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${Environment}-event-processing-queue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300

  EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${Environment}-event-processing-dlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs

  EventTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${Environment}-event-topic'
      DisplayName: Event Processing Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns

  EventTopicSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref EventTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  EventProcessingQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSToSendMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventTopic
          - Sid: AllowSpecificAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  EventTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromAccount
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
              - sns:Subscribe
            Resource: !Ref EventTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: AllowAWSServicesToPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - events.amazonaws.com
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${Environment}-EventProcessingQueueURL'

  QueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${Environment}-EventProcessingQueueARN'

  TopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref EventTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${Environment}-EventTopicARN'

  DeadLetterQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${Environment}-EventProcessingDLQARN'
